title_jp: きょ、今日はいい天気ですね！
title_vi: Hô, Hôm Nay Trời Đẹp Nhỉ!
source_case: EN-asset-is-English (en.json English, asset message fields English); title field still JP -> translated JP->VI Title Case

structure.delimiter: ASCII comma; U+201A used inside VI text

characters.ヘイリー: Hayley (speaker label kept JP). Timid noble-hero aspirant. To Commander: em/anh once rapport builds; earlier polite deferential.

notes: Title translated to Vietnamese Title Case.
Monster growl GWOOOOOOH -> GỪOOOOOOÀ (localized SFX to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT).
counts mirror EN asset exactly (authoritative); L18/56/62 collapsed internal break to match EN br=1.
